A contact placeholder will remain with a name like “DataPrivacy, Deleted”. Gift data will remain. Other data such as notes and tasks will be removed. Status will be set as “Never Ask”. Newsletter set to 'N/A'. You can request removal across all other systems at dsar@cru.org.

          organization will not remove past information, but will prevent future donations 
          and contacts from syncing.

To set a one-time savings goal, click \": To set a one-time savings goal, click "Add One-time Goal" to create a new row in the goal table. In the left cell of the new row, enter the name of your goal—for example, "Car." Then, in the right cell, enter the full dollar amount you need to raise, such as 15000.
